description: Calculate the seed age and determine the viability status (Good, Test, or Discard) for the community seed library inventory.

natural_language.prompt: Help a seed library coordinator determine which donated seeds are still viable. Calculate the age of each seed from its collection date, look up the expected lifespan for that seed type, and classify each as 'Good' (ready to distribute), 'Test' (needs germination testing), or 'Discard' (too old). Apply color coding to make the results easy to review.
